description: Execute anonymous Apex, retrieve Apex logs, and manage trace flags
apex_generate_unit_test_class_text: SFDX: Create Apex Unit Test Class
apexLog.configuration.title: Salesforce Apex Log
apexLog.configuration.logPollIntervalSec: Polling interval in seconds for auto-collecting Apex debug logs when trace flags are active. Set to 0 to disable auto-collection.
apexLog.configuration.traceFlagsDefaultD: Default duration in minutes for newly created trace flags.
apexLog.command.executeDocument: SFDX: Execute Anonymous Apex with Currently Open Editor
apexLog.command.executeSelection: SFDX: Execute Anonymous Apex with Editor's Selected Text
apexLog.command.traceFlagsCreateForCurre: SFDX: Create Trace Flag for Current User
apexLog.command.traceFlagsDeleteForCurre: SFDX: Remove Trace Flag for Current User
apexLog.command.traceFlagsCreateForUser: SFDX: Create Trace Flag for Another User
apexLog.command.traceFlagsChangeDebugLev: SFDX: Change Trace Flag Debug Level
extension_level_notifications_descriptio: Notification style for all Apex Log commands. Overrides the global salesforcedx-vscode-services.notifications setting. Individual commands can be further overridden in salesforcedx-vscode-apex-log.commandLevelNotifications.
command_level_notifications_description: Notification style for each Apex Log command. Overrides the global salesforcedx-vscode-services.notifications and extension-level salesforcedx-vscode-apex-log.extensionLevelNotifications settings.
Show progress and success as toast notifications.
notifications.progressToastSuccessOff.de: Show progress as a cancellable toast, but suppress the success notification.
notifications.progressStatusBarSuccessSt: Show progress spinner and success message in the status bar.
notifications.progressStatusBarSuccessOf: Show progress spinner in the status bar, but suppress the success notification.
notifications.toast.description: Show the confirmation as a toast notification.
notifications.statusBar.description: Show the confirmation in the status bar.
notifications_execute_anonymous_document: Notification style for Execute Anonymous Apex with Currently Open Editor.
notifications_execute_anonymous_selectio: Notification style for Execute Anonymous Apex with Editor's Selected Text.
notifications_remove_trace_flag_current_: Notification style for Remove Trace Flag for Current User.
notifications_remove_trace_flag_descript: Notification style for Remove Trace Flag.
notifications_remove_debug_level_descrip: Notification style for Remove Debug Level.
